post_copy_actions: Update package.json repository to atomicstrata/atomicmemory with directory plugins/claude-code.

notes: Claude Code plugin ships hooks and skills only; no source/dist directories at this commit. Marketplace manifest changes may require re-submission rather than a transparent version bump.
